# AChat (Anonymous Chat AI) — Documentation Index

> AChat is a no-signup, transient chat app. Pick or generate a chat ID, share the link, and talk. An optional password turns on true client-side end-to-end encryption (PBKDF2 + AES-GCM) in the browser. You can share files (up to 10 MB each, 100 MB per chat), reply in threads, create private group chats, open public communities, and embed a chat widget on any site. Every message and file auto-deletes about 10 days after it is sent (Firestore TTL). Web app: https://achat.aoneahsan.com. Author: Ahsan Mahmood (https://aoneahsan.com).

## About

AChat is built by Ahsan Mahmood. The web app runs on Vite + React 19 + Firebase (Firestore + Hosting); native Android/iOS builds use Capacitor 8; file storage is FilesHub. It is free to use, with no paid tier and no Firebase Functions. Despite the brand name "Anonymous Chat AI", AChat currently has NO AI / LLM chat features — conversations are between real people, not a chatbot. The name is historical branding; the honest description is "anonymous, ephemeral, optionally end-to-end-encrypted chat".

This `llms.txt` follows the [llmstxt.org](https://llmstxt.org) spec — a structured index for large language models.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/intro): What AChat is, who it is for, and what it is not.
- [Installation / how to use it](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/installation): Web (any browser, installable PWA) + Android. No account needed.
- [Quick Start](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/quick-start): Start your first chat in about 60 seconds.

## Features

- [Anonymous chats](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/anonymous-chats): chat IDs, sharing, presence, no sign-up.
- [Passwords & end-to-end encryption](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/passwords-and-encryption): how the optional PBKDF2 + AES-GCM encryption works and its honest limits.
- [File sharing](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/file-sharing): 10 MB per file, 100 MB per chat, FilesHub storage, previews.
- [Threads & replies](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/threads-and-replies): quote replies and threaded conversations.
- [Groups & communities](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/groups-and-communities): private named groups and public discoverable communities with client-side moderation.
- [Embeddable widget](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/embeddable-widget): inline iframe + floating launcher.
- [Keep chats & accounts](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/keep-chats-and-accounts): the optional Google sign-in that lets you reserve chats past the 10-day delete.
- [Themes & accessibility](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/features/themes-and-accessibility): full theme customizer, dyslexia/colorblind options, keyboard support.

## Concepts

- [How AChat works](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/concepts/how-it-works): the transient data model and the 10-day TTL lifecycle.
- [Security & encryption model](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/concepts/security-and-encryption): the threat model, what is protected, and what is not.
- [Data, privacy & deletion](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/concepts/data-privacy-and-deletion): what is stored, third-party processors, and how deletion works.

## Reference

- [FAQ](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/faq): common questions with direct answers.
- [Changelog](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/changelog): release history.
- [About the Author](https://achatai-docs.aoneahsan.com/about-the-author): Ahsan Mahmood's developer profile, links, contact.

- Privacy: https://achat.aoneahsan.com/privacy
